<!-- Pull Request Template -->

## Why
Short summary of the motivation for this change. Explain the user-visible or developer-visible problem this fixes.

## What
Brief description of the approach and important design decisions. Keep to 2-4 short paragraphs.

## How to test
1. Checkout the branch
2. Run these commands:
   - npm ci
   - npm run lint
   - npm run test
   - npm run dev (and validate the feature)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code builds and tests pass locally
- [ ] Linting passes
- [ ] Add/updated docs where applicable
- [ ] New code has type coverage (TS) or unit tests where appropriate
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in changes

## Notes for reviewers
- Anything non-obvious or tradeoffs to be aware of
